elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon-style person holding a credit card, smiling confidently, with a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon-style person holding a credit card, smiling confidently, pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges, vibrant colors, centered composition.
